GoogleAuth._comment: Valid Google OAuth client IDs (token 'aud' must match one). Set real values via env: GoogleAuth__ClientIds__0 (Web), __1 (iOS), __2 (Android).

AppleAuth._comment: Valid Apple client IDs. [0] = native bundle id (com.gghub.mobile), [1] = web Services ID. Set via env: AppleAuth__ClientIds__0, __1.

DownloadAnalytics._comment: IngestKey is a shared secret with the Next.js /api/track proxy: it makes the proxy the ONLY writer. Empty here on purpose, set it in Railway env as DownloadAnalytics__IngestKey. Empty value = auth check skipped (dev only).
